ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'}),
    p2 = (a)-[:DIRECTED]->(b:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p3 = (a)-[r:ACTED_IN]->(c:Movie {title: 'Raging Bull'})-[:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {title: 'The Departed'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What is the directorial influence of Martin Scorsese on *The Departed*, considering how he directed *Taxi Driver* and acted in *Raging Bull*—and how his reviews shaped its reception?

cypher: MATCH (martin:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})-[:DIRECTED]->(departed:Movie {title: "The Departed"}),       (martin)-[:DIRECTED]->(taxiDriver:Movie {title: "Taxi Driver"}),       (martin)-[:ACTED_IN]->(ragingBull:Movie {title: "Raging Bull"}),       (reviewer:Person)-[:REVIEWED]->(departed)\nRETURN martin, departed, taxiDriver, ragingBull, reviewer
